Mindset and techniques to help achieve 10X growth!
• Stream on Live At Least Once a Week
• Comment on Top Keyword Results
• Tag Influencers in Video Descriptions
• Start Posting Video Shorts Regularly
• Comment on Influencer Follower Videos
• Begin Running Ads to Your Top Videos
• Start Posting New Videos Regularly
• Comment Instantly on Influencer Videos
• Build Relationships with Subscribers
• Setup Channel, Links, About and Intro
• Invite Friends and Family to Subscribe
• Subscribe to Other Influencer Channels
